articles.author: Tom Parfitt
articles.title: Ebola outbreak live updates: WHO and Africa CDC unveil $518 million plan as DRC cases pass 450 - Yahoo
articles.description: A Kenyan court has blocked a proposed U.S. Ebola quarantine facility that has triggered protests in the country.
articles.content: The World Health Organization and the Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention announced a $518 million emergency response plan on Friday aimed at containing the Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak in… [+1574 chars]
